page: Amazon Web Services c5d.18xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8124M processor with an x86_64 architecture, offering 72 vCPUs across 36 physical cores running at 3.4 GHz. The system is equipped with 144.0 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing a compute-focused allocation of 2.0 GB per core. For local storage, the instance includes 1800 GB of NVMe SSD storage, and it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks highlight strong multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and Passmark CPU extended instructions testing in the top 25%. The instance also demonstrates strong memory bandwidth for read-only operations, reaching 3706.44 GB/sec for small cached blocks and 209.03 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. Database operations are also a strong point, scoring 22233.59 in Passmark database tests. However, single-core performance and LLM text generation speeds are average to weak, with text generation on a medium 7B model reaching only 7.25 tokens/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the c5d.18xlarge offers high compute density and bundled high-speed local NVMe storage, reducing the need for separate provisioned block storage for scratch space. This makes it highly suitable for compute-intensive workloads that require fast local read/write access, such as high-performance web serving, batch processing, database operations, and distributed analytics.
description: Amazon Web Services c5d.18xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 72 vCPUs and 36 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8124M processor running at 3.4 GHz. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it includes 144.0 GB of DDR4 memory and 1800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The instance excels in multi-core processing and memory read bandwidth, as evidenced by strong stress-ng multi-core and Passmark database benchmark results. With a 25 Gbps baseline network speed, it is designed for high-performance computing, batch processing, and database workloads requiring fast local scratch storage.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c5d.18xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 72 vCPUs, 144 GB DDR4 RAM, and 1800 GB local NVMe SSD storage, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.

tagline: A high-density compute-optimized instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and integrated high-speed local NVMe SSD storage.

144.0 GB of DDR4 memory and 1800 GB of bundled local NVMe SSD storage
Strong multi-core CPU and database performance based on benchmark testing
25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth utilizing the AWS Nitro hypervisor
Well-suited for batch processing, distributed analytics, and database workloads
